title: Type Effectiveness Chart
html: Stub. The 18-type rock-paper-scissors lattice that governs Pokémon battles. Yahir transcribed all 18 type matchups by hand in 2018 12 24 normal neutral to everything at 16 — implies competitive intent or simply systems-thinking pleasure. Worth flagging because much of his later thinking (disruption, mindless human interface disruption) reads as the same kind of structured "X beats Y" mapping applied to industries.
